0.text: Minimal bronchiectasis in the central parts of both lungs

1.text: Minimal emphysematous changes in both lungs

2.text: Calcific nodules in both lungs, largest measuring approximately 8 mm in diameter in the anterior segment of the upper lobe of the right lung

3.text: Noncalcified nodules measuring approximately 4.5 mm in diameter in both lungs, largest in the laterobasal segment of the lower lobe of the left lung
